title: codereview-P2: ccp15_vectors() in generate.py missing density_estimate_high and sf_selection_low_density_capacity present in ccp15.json
description: Source of truth (generate.py) and generated JSON are out of sync. The 2 density/SF vectors added in b10q not reflected in generator function. Must sync before adding the 6 new SF/EMA/load_factor ones. This would cause test drift. Fix by adding them to function with proper oracle fields.
